name: Single-dose tadalafil did not significantly improve neuropsychological performance in PASTIS
statement: In the PASTIS neuropsychological secondary outcomes analysis, a single 20 mg tadalafil dose did not produce significant treatment effects on the tested cognitive outcomes in older people with symptomatic small vessel disease; Digit Span Forward showed only a trend-level effect.
population_or_context: Older symptomatic SVD participants; indirect for healthy men age 30 to 50.
time_horizon: Cognitive testing before and 3-5 hours after single-dose administration.
quantitative_note: No significant treatment effects across neuropsychological tests; Digit Span Forward treatment effect 0.37 with CI 0.01 to 0.72 and P=0.0521.

source_locator.quote_or_paraphrase_note: Source reports no significant treatment effects in any neuropsychological tests and a trend on Digit Span Forward.

caveats: This finding is not direct evidence in healthy adults.
The PASTIS cognitive outcomes were secondary and the trial was powered for cerebral blood-flow endpoints.
Single-dose exposure cannot rule in or rule out longer-term cognitive effects.
population_profile: Older adults with symptomatic cerebral small vessel disease; median MoCA 26; not healthy men age 30 to 50.
indication_context: Experimental off-label trial for SVD-related cognitive and cerebral blood-flow hypotheses.
endpoint_measure: CANTAB reaction-time measures, speed of information processing, Digit Span Forward/Backward, semantic fluency, and related neuropsychological tests.
effect_estimate: No significant treatment effects across tested cognitive outcomes; Digit Span Forward treatment effect 0.37, CI 0.01 to 0.72, P=0.0521.
safety_findings: No serious adverse reactions were reported in the paper, but the finding should not be used as a broad safety conclusion for off-label use.
directness_to_target_population: Tadalafil-specific human evidence, but low directness for healthy 30-50 men because the population was older and had symptomatic SVD and the exposure was acute 20 mg dosing.
confounding_and_bias_limits: Secondary endpoints, limited sample size, disease population, brief follow-up, and a trial not powered primarily for cognitive outcomes.
